title: FoxSMPUtilities
description: SMP utilities plugin, that allows you to disable pvp, griefing, netherite craftings, dimensions, elytras, change pearl cooldowns, nerf end crystal damage
body:
## 🦊 FoxSMPUtilities Plugin
### A lightweight survival utility plugin for controlling crafting, portal access, Elytra usage, cooldowns, and more.

## 📦 How It Works
**FoxSMPUtilities lets you fine-tune essential Minecraft survival mechanics via a single config file.**

Whether you're building a competitive server or a chill SMP, this plugin gives you flexible control over dimension access, powerful items, Elytra, PVP, and consumable cooldowns — all easily reloadable.
Use `/foxsmputilities reload` or `/fsu reload` to apply changes instantly without restarting your server.

---

### ⚙️ Features
- **💥 Explosion Damage Multipliers**
  
  - Increase or Reduce different explosions damage: End Crystals, TNT Minecarts, Beds and Anchors!

- **🚪 Dimension Access Control**
  
  - Toggle Nether and End travel via config.  
  - Blocks player and entity portal use (including ender pearl exploits).

- **🛠️ Crafting Restrictions**
  
  - Prevent crafting of Netherite armor and tools.  

- **🪂 Disable Items**
  
  - Enable or disable Elytra/Riptide usage completely.  
  - Optional Elytra/Riptide cooldown when attacked system to balance mid/late game.

- **⚔️ PVP Toggle**
  
  - Disable world-wide player-vs-player combat.

- **🧊 Item Cooldowns**
  
  - Set cooldowns for ender pearls, golden apples, and enchanted golden apples etc.  
  - Applies per-player item usage cooldowns in ticks (1s = 20 ticks).

- **🔁 Reload Support**
  
  - Reload the config without restarting using `/foxsmptilities reload`.

- **📦 Lightweight and Efficient**
  
  - No performance impact — plug and play!

---

## 📝 Config
```
allow-end: true
allow-nether: true

allow-netherite-armor: true
allow-netherite-tools: true

allow-elytra: true

elytra-cooldown-when-attacked: 0
apply-elytra-cooldown-when-hit-by-mobs: false

allow-riptide: true

riptide-cooldown-when-attacked: 0
apply-riptide-cooldown-when-hit-by-mobs: false

allow-pvp: true
crystal-dmg-multiplier: 1.0
tnt-minecart-dmg-multiplier: 1.0
bed-and-anchor-dmg-multiplier: 1.0

pearl-cooldown: 20
golden-apple-cooldown: 0
enchanted-golden-apple-cooldown: 0
wind-charge-cooldown: 10

cancel-explosion-grief-enabled: false
cancel-explosion-grief: tnt, creeper, end_crystal, respawn_anchor, fireball, wither, wither_skull, bed
